raw_definition: acc_ij = sum_k int64(input_ik) * int64(weight_jk); NO bias. output_ij = symmetric signed quant of acc (per-tensor max-abs, bit_width=8).
dtype_note: input/output/weight: signed int8 per element ([-128,127]); PyTorch storage dtype int8; JSON lists are integers in that range; no scale/bias fields.
